data.system: AREAL-NEVA CORE Telegram orchestration with task_worker, ai_router, reply_sender, ask_ai, OpenRouter gateway, memory.db storage
data.architecture: Server-first Telegram orchestration where telegram_daemon creates tasks in core.db, task_worker processes tasks, ai_router executes AI logic via ask_ai and orchestra_runtime, reply_sender delivers results to Telegram
data.pipeline: Telegram message -> telegram_daemon.py -> task created in core.db -> task_worker.py picks task (INTAKE/IN_PROGRESS) -> process_ai_task via core.ai_router -> ask_ai.py -> lib/orchestra_runtime.execute -> result saved in DB -> task_worker reads result -> _normalize_result cleans output -> reply_sender sends message -> state REPLIED
data.memory: Primary memory stored in /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db with automatic read via ask_ai GET /memory and automatic write after response; task results stored in core.db and re-read by worker for final delivery
data.integrations: Telegram Bot API, OpenRouter API, local HTTP memory service
data.db: core.db table tasks with fields id,state,status,raw_input,result,error_message; memory.db table memory(id,chat_id,key,value,timestamp)
data.logic: Tasks created from Telegram go to INTAKE, worker transitions to IN_PROGRESS, processes via ai_router, stores result, sends via reply_sender, final state forced to REPLIED if transition fails
data.decisions: Remove route_task usage in worker; use process_ai_task for real execution; read final result from DB instead of router output; filter placeholder texts like 'Передано в общий pipeline'; use safe async wrappers for sync/async compatibility
data.solutions: route_task pending output -> replaced with process_ai_task call; placeholder responses filtered via _normalize_result; missing send function error fixed in reply_sender; invalid transitions handled via forced REPLIED state; sync/async mismatch resolved via maybe_await wrappers
data.code: task_worker replaced route_task call with process_ai_task execution and DB result read; added _process_ai_task_safe and _maybe_await; implemented _is_placeholder_result and improved _normalize_result; reply_sender fallback adjusted to avoid returning raw placeholder text
errors: Передано в общий pipeline -> replace route_task with process_ai_task
_send_fn is not defined -> fix reply_sender send function resolution
invalid transition IN_PROGRESS -> AWAITING_CONFIRMATION -> force REPLIED state
пустой ответ после очистки -> improve _normalize_result filtering
RuntimeError cannot reshape tensor -> STT failure on voice input
data.state: Processes running, worker active, messages sending, tasks reaching REPLIED, but AI pipeline previously returned pending instead of real result; fix applied to use ai_router
data.limits: AI model execution layer dependent on process_ai_task correctness; reply_sender flood control not fully addressed; STT errors still occur on some voice inputs
data.pending: Verify process_ai_task returns real result; confirm end-to-end reply correctness in Telegram; stabilize STT processing for voice inputs
